heading: Watch a company come to life.
sub: Every CorpSec customer gets the same dashboard. Status, renewals, filings, documents — surfaced quietly, never demanding.

note.title: Two entities? Twenty? One dashboard.
note.body: About 40% of CorpSec customers run 2–5 entities across countries. The back office consolidates filings, renewals and bookkeeping into one view — one named account manager, one invoice.
